---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — a rough API sketch or UX description
is more useful than a high-level idea.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art, screenshots, or any other context.
